action_text: Click the "All" button to open the Application Navigator
rationale: To reach the "Expense Lines" module, the fastest path is opening the All menu (Application Navigator) where applications/modules like Cost -> Expense Lines are listed.

action_text: Type "Expense Lines" into the global Search field
rationale: If the global search can navigate directly to modules, searching for "Expense Lines" could take us straight to the desired list.

action_text: Type "Cost" into the global Search field
rationale: Searching for the parent application name "Cost" may surface the "Cost" app and its modules (including Expense Lines) for quick navigation.
Adjusting the search context (e.g., to Applications/Navigation) can ensure search results include modules like "Expense Lines" rather than records.

action_text: Wait 1.5 seconds for the page to finish loading
rationale: The page shows a loading spinner; waiting briefly may allow menus and search to fully initialize before interacting.
